stemHtml: When using an ADF indicator of the manually rotatable card type, which of the following statements is true?

options.a: Relative bearing is normally indicated under the pointer needle.
options.b: The card should be rotated so that the aircraft heading is at the top of the indicator.
options.c: The aircraft heading may be marked on the indicator with a manually controlled “bug”.
options.d: It may be combined with a VOR indicator.
